title: Multi-Armed Bandit Decision-Making Loop
description: A flowchart illustrating the core decision-exploration loop of a multi-armed bandit algorithm, highlighting the trade-off between exploiting known rewards and exploring new options.
relationships: Agent selects an Action based on Policy and Value Estimates
Action is applied to the Environment
Agent updates its Value Estimate for the chosen action based on the Reward
The updated Value Estimate informs the next Policy decision
